details.note: Reliability & Trust Infrastructure plan — 10 workstreams covering safe mode, desktop doctor, event taxonomy, secrets, plugin security, trust tiers, first-run UX, performance budgets, CLI recovery, done semantics

Completed baseline assessment of 7 reliability areas. Event schema exists but eventType is freeform (needs taxonomy). Debug packet has redactConfig but not broad secret handling. Plugin system has zero capability manifests. Permission model is flat ask/allow/deny with no trust tiers. Onboarding exists but is generic with no repo scan. Safe mode and desktop doctor don't exist yet.
Pre-fabricated 5 architect deploy prompts for safe mode, desktop doctor, event taxonomy, secrets, plugin security — ready to deploy when lane-owner handoffs arrive
Event Taxonomy Audit complete — 43 unique event types across 25 files, 7 naming inconsistencies, 60% of canonical taxonomy missing, 5-phase migration plan produced

Plugin security audit complete — 5 CRITICAL, 4 HIGH, 1 MODERATE, 1 LOW vulnerabilities. Zero sandboxing, no capability manifests, full process access. Designed 14-capability manifest schema with runtime enforcement.

Safe Mode design complete (9 degradation points, 3-tier architecture, 6-phase plan). Secrets audit complete (5 critical gaps, 8 existing mechanisms, 18+ high-risk sites, 5-layer policy). Both artifacts published.
RL-003 architect completed — 2 audit corrections, 4-step execution plan covering 25 files, 43 event constants, 1 rename. EventName leaf module, two-step BusEvent.define validation, backstop test.

Secrets policy architect completed — 5 surgical fixes addressing 5 critical + 2 high root causes. ENV_BLOCKLIST (31+ vars), sidecar env fix, cross-spawn fix, OPENCODE_AUTH_CONTENT blocklist addition, debug-packet value scanning. All fixes ≤20 lines each.

Plugin security architect completed — 14-capability manifest schema, 5 runtime enforcement gates, tool namespace enforcement, built-in trust for 8 first-party plugins, 10-step implementation plan across 2 phases. Also launched background critic, safety audit, and validation design.

Desktop Doctor design complete — 14 checks, semaphore-based runner, 3 interfaces (CLI/UI/CI), structured DoctorReport schema with 0-100 score, 10 reliability scenarios mapped. Critical finding: native/ directory missing from desktop package.

Safe Mode architect completed — 2 phases, 13 fixes, 16 modified + 4 new files, ~700 lines. PGlite try/catch, main process safe mode routing, HealthRegistry Effect service, plugin quarantine after 3 crashes.

Safe Mode architect completed — 13 fixes across 16 modified + 4 new files, 2 phases (Init Flow Restructuring + Health Registry), ~700 lines. PGlite try/catch, sidecar error classification, main process safe mode routing via Effect.catch, HealthRegistry service, plugin crash counters/quarantine, 7 smoke tests specified.

All 5 secrets fixes applied. ENV_BLOCKLIST created (core + desktop), sanitizedProcessEnv no-op fixed, createSidecarEnv sanitized, cross-spawn env filtered, debug-packet value scanning added. Typecheck passes (zero new errors).

Event taxonomy fully enforced. Created event-names.ts (43 constants, leaf module). Runtime warning on unregistered names. All 39+ BusEvent.define() sites migrated across 22 files. 1 rename (installation.update-available→installation.update_available). Typecheck passes, zero new errors.

Review compression cartography complete — 8 systems explored, 7 smoking guns found. Plan/diff comparison entirely manual. claim_atoms are prose, not file references. 5 incompatible validation schemas. 3 mandated governance schemas missing.

Campaign truth model cartography done — 10 subsystems surveyed. KEY FINDING: campaign/ module (2600+ lines) exists with state machine + secretary + integrator but has ZERO imports from outside itself. No campaignId/laneId foreign keys. SyncEvent system has proper event sourcing with aggregates — right foundation. EventBridge is dead code.
Evidence-gated push cartography done — 8 systems mapped, 14 gaps, 3 P0 blockers. Three mandated JSON schemas missing. Binder persistence stubbed (getBinders returns []). No SHA chain of custody.

Plugin security capability enforcement implemented. 5 new files: types, registry, hook-map, enforcer, index. Modified: plugin/index.ts (hook dispatch gating, trust levels), tool/registry.ts (namespace prefix, tool.register gate). 8 first-party plugins registered with built-in trust. Deferred: config gating (needs per-plugin PluginInput restructuring), network gating (needs globalThis.fetch proxy).

Evidence-gated push architecture complete — 8 PushGate predicates evaluating in parallel, PushRecord schema (JSON + Effect), ProcessAuditor with 6 protocol violations. Campaign already has push_ready→pushed states — design adds predicate-constrained transition.

Review compression architecture complete. 4 JSON Schema files (including 3 mandated governance schemas). Comparison engine with 3-tier file extraction from prose claim_atoms. Weight rubric: 5 groups (hidden→critical). Manifest generator + tool. All 7 smoking guns addressed.

Campaign truth model architecture complete. 5 waves, 9 files, zero new tables. Key: dual state machines discovered (Secretary private vs state-machine.ts canonical). 3 incompatible RuntimeEvent types bridged. Campaign events share runtime_events table with campaign_id/lane_id/role columns.

Safe mode executor complete — 11/13 fixes applied. PGlite try/catch, sidecar error classification, safe mode routing via Effect.catch, safe mode renderer + IPC, HealthRegistry service + endpoint + layer wiring. Deferred: component health reporting (non-Effect init paths), plugin crash counters (config persistence architecture).
Session completed — all Phase 4 executors finished (11/13 + 8/10), all Phase 5 architects designed. Handoff prompt written for next session with foundation-lane-first parallel execution model.
